title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at EaseMyTrip - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at EaseMyTrip - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
EaseMyTrip invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Thane location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About EaseMyTrip:
EaseMyTrip is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EaseMyTrip!
